name: AULA SC 300 RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse
description: AULA SC 300 RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse Price in Pakistan and Key Features: Wireless Connectivity : 2.4GHz plug-and-play for seamless gaming. Smart Sleep Modes : Three levels of smart sleep to conserve power. DPI and Polling Rate : Default 1200 DPI and 250Hz polling rate for smooth performance. Four-Color LED Lights : Stylish, cool lighting enhances the gaming experience. Battery and Charging Indicator : 400mAh lithium battery with LED charging indicator. Compact Design : Lightweight and ergonomic
